title: Incompatible query results with UNHEX function
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```SQL
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1;
CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES (1);
SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE UNHEX(2038330881); -- {}, expected: {1}
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
SELECT returns {1}
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
SELECT returns empty
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
Release Version: v7.2.0
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 9fd5f4a8e4f273a60fbe7d3848f85a1be8f0600b
Git Branch: heads/refs/tags/v7.2.0
UTC Build Time: 2023-06-27 15:04:42
GoVersion: go1.20.5
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c2 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, c3 INT DEFAULT 0);
SELECT c3 FROM t2 WHERE c2 = '123';
SELECT c3 FROM t2 WHERE c2 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: UNHEX function returns empty instead of expected value
